judgment.summary: High-growth company with strong revenue expansion and margins, but currently unprofitable and trading at a high valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat consensus EPS by 7.0%; next earnings 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth 33.5% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Gross margin 73.3% — excellent pricing power and efficiency in service delivery.
Free cash flow $755M TTM — positive cash generation despite accounting losses.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $234.18.
negatives: Operating margin -9.7% and Profit margin -3.7% — the company is not yet profitable on an accounting basis.
Forward P/E 139x and Price/Sales 32x — valuation is very high, pricing in significant future growth.
Debt/Equity 230.86 — leverage is substantial, though offset by significant cash.
Return on equity -5.9% and Return on assets -2.7% — negative returns indicate current unprofitability.

news.paragraph: Cloudflare (NET) has no recent headlines to inform an options trade. The company last reported earnings in March, beating estimates by a narrow margin. The next earnings date is scheduled for July 30th, which may serve as a catalyst.

$NET Sell the news. 194 tomorrow buy the dip.
$NET no wonder it moves so stable these days. whales were in but seems that some of them are leaving
